message:
test(observability): comprehensive OTel metrics test suite

Add tests/otel_metrics.rs (753 lines) validating the full metrics
pipeline: MetricsProvider trait compliance, TestMetricsProvider spy,
OtelMetrics OpenTelemetry integration (feature-gated), thread-safety
under concurrent emission, NoOpMetrics zero-overhead verification,
InMemoryExporter round-trip, snapshot building, and custom exporters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
